lines: Brother Cyprian points at the yard marks with a cracked baton.
"Footwork first. If God wanted you to die tangled in your own coat, He would have issued a cheaper coat."

effects.log: Cyprian marks the close drill complete after the baton line.
Cyprian marks the close drill complete after the empty-hand line.

choices.label: Give Cyprian the name from the coat cuff

effects.log: Cyprian closes Paulinus Corda's old kit line.

lines: Cyprian rubs the spoon-pressed letters clean with his thumb.
"Paulinus Corda. I kept charging that coat against his kit because no one could prove he left it. Keep the ducat. I will close the line."

choices.label: Leave Cyprian with the kit record

lines: Cyprian sets the baton against your forearm and drives you through the chalk turns.
"Good. You kept the point between us and found your coat at the end. I have watched recruits lose both."
Cyprian catches your wrist once. The second time you turn his grip into the fence post.
"That will do. A knife hand still owns a shoulder. Move the shoulder and let the knife complain."
Cyprian taps one chalk loop on the issue satchel, then points toward the center devil target.
"Close work is signed. Read the useful shots at the range and the second knot is yours. Do not shoot the target. I am nearly out of devils."
